Interface FileCollection.Walker

All Known Implementing Classes:
JavaReduxFileCollection.Walker, ZipFileCollection.Walker
Enclosing interface:
FileCollection
public static interface FileCollection.Walker
A Walker allows to iterate (once and one way) through a FileCollection.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    DataLocation
    getCurrentDataLocation()
    get a DataLocation object describing the current file.
    String
    getCurrentName()
    get the name of the current file in the iteration.
    String
    getType()
    return the type of the structure that is iterated.
    InputStream
    openCurrent()
    create a new InputStream for the current element of the iteration.
    InputStream
    openCurrent(FileRepo repo)
    Create a new InputStream for the current element of the iteration.
    boolean
    step()
    step to next element in the collection if there is another one.

  • Method Details

    • step

      boolean step()
      step to next element in the collection if there is another one. The getCurrent...() functions will behave differently after a call to step().
      Returns:
      true iff there is another element in the collection

    • getCurrentName

      String getCurrentName() throws NoSuchElementException
      get the name of the current file in the iteration. This is only the short name not including any location data.
      Returns:
      a short file name, not null
      Throws:
      NoSuchElementException - if the previous call to step returned false.

    • getCurrentDataLocation

      DataLocation getCurrentDataLocation() throws NoSuchElementException
      get a DataLocation object describing the current file. The dynamic type of the result depends on the implementation in use.
      Returns:
      a DataLocation, not null
      Throws:
      NoSuchElementException - if the previous call to step returned false.

    • getType

      String getType()
      return the type of the structure that is iterated. Must return the same value for any call
      Returns:
      a non-null String describing the type (e.g. "zip" or "file");
      Throws:
      NoSuchElementException - if the previous call to step returned false.

    • openCurrent

      InputStream openCurrent() throws IOException, NoSuchElementException
      create a new InputStream for the current element of the iteration. It is in the user's obligation to close the stream after using it.
      Returns:
      a freshly created InputStream, the dynamic type depends on the implementation
      Throws:
      IOException - if the resource cannot be opened
      NoSuchElementException - if the previous call to step returned false.

    • openCurrent

      InputStream openCurrent(FileRepo repo) throws IOException, NoSuchElementException
      Create a new InputStream for the current element of the iteration. A copy of the file the InputStream is read from is stored in the given FileRepo. It is in the user's obligation to close the stream after using it.
      Parameters:
      repo - the FileRepo to store a copy of the current element a freshly created InputStream, the dynamic type depends on the implementation
      Returns:
      a freshly created InputStream, the dynamic type depends on the implementation
      Throws:
      IOException - if the resource cannot be opened
      NoSuchElementException - if the previous call to step returned false.
